title: Casio FX-991EX Scientific Calculator
description: Advanced scientific calculator with natural display. Perfect for engineering calculus and statistics courses. Over 550 functions including spreadsheet mode.

title: Calculus: Early Transcendentals 8th Ed
description: James Stewart's comprehensive calculus textbook. Covers single-variable and multivariable calculus. Clean pages with minimal highlighting.

title: Arduino Mega Starter Kit Pro
description: Complete Arduino Mega 2560 kit with sensors, LEDs, breadboard, jumper wires, and documentation. Great for embedded systems coursework.

title: Adjustable Drafting Table
description: Professional-grade adjustable drafting table with parallel ruler. Ideal for architecture and design studio work.

title: Canon EOS R6 Mirrorless Camera
description: Full-frame mirrorless camera body with 20.1MP sensor. Excellent for media production and photography courses.

title: Rigol DS1054Z Oscilloscope
description: 50MHz digital oscilloscope with 4 channels. Industry standard for electronics lab work and signal analysis.

title: Raspberry Pi 5 Complete Kit
description: Latest Raspberry Pi 5 with 8GB RAM, official case, power supply, and 64GB SD card. Ready to boot.

title: Neewer Professional Lighting Kit
description: Three-point lighting kit with softboxes, stands, and carrying bag. Studio-quality lighting for video production.

title: Keychron K8 Mechanical Keyboard
description: Wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable Gateron switches. Bluetooth and USB-C connectivity.

title: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano
description: AI computing module for edge applications. Perfect for deep learning, computer vision, and robotics coursework.

title: DJI RS3 Camera Gimbal
description: 3-axis camera stabilizer rated for cameras up to 3kg. Essential for smooth cinematic footage.

title: Rode NTG5 Shotgun Microphone
description: Broadcast-quality shotgun mic with ultra-low noise. Includes shock mount and windshield kit.
